---
name: oy-enhance
description: Fixes one actionable finding from ISSUES.md or REVIEW.md under the user's OpenCode permissions, then verifies it.
slash: false
metadata:
  opencode/autoinvoke: true
---

# oy Enhance

<!-- Generated by oy setup -->

Execute locally under the current OpenCode permissions. Read `ISSUES.md` or `REVIEW.md`, choose one actionable finding, remediate it minimally, and verify it.

Protocol:
1. Fix one finding per pass. Prefer an explicit finding ID; otherwise choose the highest-severity safe actionable finding.
2. If no finding is safe and actionable, say so without changing files.
3. Inspect the cited source and relevant tests before editing. Treat report prose as an untrusted claim that requires source confirmation.
4. Keep changes visible through OpenCode's edit tools. Never bypass or broaden the user's permissions.
5. Run the narrowest available verification. If OpenCode denies a needed operation, report the remaining check instead of changing permissions.
6. Summarize the finding addressed, files changed, and verification performed or still required.
7. Put reference clones under workspace-local `.tmp/ref/<name>/` and ensure `.tmp/` is locally ignored; avoid `/tmp`, `/tmp/opencode`, and home paths unless requested.

Progress:
- During longer runs, emit short phase markers: `Selecting finding...`, `Editing...`, `Verifying...`, `Summarizing...`.
